variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 14703 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 14703 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 14703 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 321.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 264.5 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 152.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 7/16"-20UNF, Height 1 (H1): 422.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 410.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 391.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P771524 Air Filter, Primary Round | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14703
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P771524 Air Filter, Primary Round | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14703
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Air Filters? Strong, pliable gasket is compressed against the air cleaner housing to create a tight seal. • High-efficiency cellulose media performs across a wide range of heavy-duty engine applications. • Corrosion resistant, coated steel liners support media during operation and help maximize airflow. • Pleatloc™ feature ensures uniform pleat spacing and prevents media from bunching to promote longer service life.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4753M Air, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14703
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF4753M Air, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14703
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4753M axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
